data.name: Vikings: Sex and Blood
data.detailed_description:
You might also like:


關於此遊戲

                                                               ⚔️ Vikings: Sex and Blood

Shipwrecked. Powerless. Left to die.

You survive only because Hella, Goddess of Hell, chooses you as her mortal champion. Now you must rise from broken raider to Jarl of Krokr — conquering rivals, bending the village to your will, and serving a goddess who expects absolute obedience.

This is the Age of the Vikings.
Steel. Blood. Desire.

🔥 Rise to Power

Vikings: Sex and Blood is a story-driven sandbox visual novel where you control the pace of your conquest.

  • Earn Love Points to deepen relationships

  • Unlock all key characters to advance the main story

  • Overthrow the cowardly Jarl Sten

  • Unite the island under your rule

Your choices determine who stands beside you — and who kneels.

🖤 Women of Krokr

Every woman has her own ambitions, weaknesses, and desires. Focus on who you want, when you want — but to become Jarl, you’ll eventually need them all.

Sindri – The Blacksmith

Strong, serious, and inexperienced in love. Beneath her hardened exterior lies a shy woman longing for affection and a man worthy of her forge.

Freya – The Warrior

Fearless in battle, uncertain in intimacy. Raid beside her, earn her respect, and discover the softer side hidden beneath her steel.

Yrsa – The Curious Sister

Young, playful, and far more adventurous than she appears. Open-minded and eager to explore what the world — and you — have to offer.

Lei – The Rescued Slave

Grateful, naïve, and slowly discovering freedom. Her loyalty grows naturally, but so does her desire.

And More…

From the dominant goddess Hella and her ruthless priestess Astrid to the seductive Jarl’s wife Kai, the clever advisor Hilda, and the guarded merchant Revna — Krokr is filled with women whose trust must be earned.

⚔️ Features

  • 5,550+ high-quality renders

  • 680 animated scenes

  • 50+ original soundtrack tracks

  • 10–14 hours of gameplay

  • Sandbox progression with a central story

  • Character Love Point system

  • Political power struggle and divine manipulation

What to Expect

A dark, erotic Viking saga about ambition, loyalty, and domination.
Rise from nothing. Take the throne. Claim what is yours.

data.short_description: Meet gorgeous women! Raid and defend your village, explore the islands of the north and build your own harem in Vikings: Sex and Blood!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Quad Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050 ( 4G VRAM )
  • DirectX: 版本：11
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Quad Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1070 ( 6G VRAM ) or Higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Quad Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1050 ( 4G VRAM )
  • DirectX: Version 11
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Quad Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1070 ( 6G VRAM ) or Higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
